theme_and_archetype.description: High-end, cinematic, moody barbershop and spa named C&C. Premium aesthetic using a dark emerald base, antique gold accents, and deep purple secondary details. High contrast, elegant typography, and generous spacing.

colors.guidelines: Use the dark green background exclusively. Never use pure black. Gold (--primary) is for key CTAs and borders. Purple (--secondary) is strictly for subtle glow effects (e.g., backdrop blur layers) and accent hover states to provide a rich, royal undertone without overwhelming the green/gold primary palette.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12, p-24). Sections must breathe. No cramped containers.
layout_and_spacing.grids: Use Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Gallery and Features. Mode B (Control Room) for Admin Dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and forms. Center-align hero headings and major section titles.
layout_and_spacing.hero_overlay: bg-black/50 with a subtle radial gradient of purple (bg-purple-900/20) to blend into the green.

components.buttons: Flat background with 1px border. Gold background for primary with dark green text. Hover: slightly lighter gold, subtle shadow.
components.cards: Solid dark green (lighter than background). 1px border-white/5. Do not use heavy shadows, rely on borders. Max border-radius 0px (sharp edges) or 4px.
components.forms: Shadcn inputs customized. bg-transparent, border-white/20, focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary.
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80, 1px bottom border border-white/10.
components.qr_code: Display in a premium 'card' in the footer or a dedicated booking section. Add a subtle gold glow around it.

images.description: Barber grooming client - Use as main hero background with dark overlay.
Nail salon manicure - Use in services showcase.
Pedicure feet - Use in services showcase.
Vintage barber chair - Use for haircut service card.
Spa pool - Use for spa service card.
Custom Gold and Dark Green QR code for booking.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: lucide-react, react-hook-form, zod, @hookform/resolvers, date-fns, react-day-picker.
Build the application using standard JavaScript (.js/.jsx) as typescript is not configured.
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts. Overlapping elements, asymmetry.
Use Shadcn UI for the Booking Form (Input, Select, Form, Calendar, Popover) and Admin Dashboard (Table, Tabs). Customize Shadcn components directly in their files to match the guidelines.
Must include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='book-now-btn', data-testid='service-select').
Admin Dashboard should be accessible via a /admin route or a tab. Use strict 'Control Room' grid for it.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Import and use 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Blend the purple requirement as subtle ambient gradients (e.g., absolute div with bg-purple-900/20 blur-[100px]) to avoid clashing with the green/gold foreground. This adds depth to the luxury feel.
Ensure the booking form handles name, phone, email, service selection, stylist/barber selection, date, time, and notes.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use only the URLs provided in the media section.
